**Ethylene HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, plain RKS, density fitting OFF) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied ethylene.xyz, single‐point (no optimization). SCF converged in 6 cycles; no warnings reported. HOMO = –7.6155818 eV, LUMO = –0.17986527 eV → gap = 7.4357165 eV. Command:

/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8bergc0r/live.json

Results JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8bergc0r/live.json
